En Ventahouse

For Sale: Flamingo House Live the Luxury Oceanfront!

$2,900,000

Guanacaste Province, Playa Flamingo

Preguntar sobre esta propiedad

4

Habitaciones

5

Baños

572 m²

Construcción

Descripción

Property for Sale Location: Miramar, within the private community of Mar Vista, Playa Flamingo Construction Size: 6,165 sq ft Bedrooms: 4 with private bathrooms + ½ bathroom Architect: José Mora Description This recently constructed luxury residence boasts an innovative design and spectacular ocean views. Created by renowned Costa Rican architect José Mora, it stands out for its manta ray-inspired structure, glass walls framing the Pacific, travertine floors, Venetian stucco, handcrafted wood furnishings, and original art pieces. Interior Entrance with an oversized wooden door. Open-concept living room, bright and elegant, with a sectional sofa for 12 and a custom entertainment center. Modern kitchen with an island, light wood cabinetry, and stainless steel appliances. Dining area with a local wood table and designer lamp. Bedrooms 4 en-suite bedrooms + ½ bathroom. Ground floor guest rooms with queen beds. Two master suites on the second floor with king beds, spacious walk-in closets, private balconies, and bathrooms with rain showers and ocean views. Architectural Details Central staircase framed by large windows. Panoramic second-floor window with an "aquarium" effect. Exterior Spacious terrace with an outdoor kitchen, grill, and dining area. Curved infinity pool and lounge with ocean views. Solar energy installed. Community Miramar, within Mar Vista, combines security, tranquility, and nature. It offers: Gym, sports courts, and trails. Gracia Restaurant with an infinity pool and sea view. Private school at the community entrance. Proximity to Flamingo and Conchal beaches, marina, supermarkets, restaurants, and medical services. 👉 Schedule your visit and experience this unique property in Playa Flamingo firsthand.

Description (English)

Property for Sale Location: Miramar, within the private community of Mar Vista, Playa Flamingo Construction Size: 6,165 sq ft Bedrooms: 4 with private bathrooms + ½ bathroom Architect: José Mora Description This recently constructed luxury residence boasts an innovative design and spectacular ocean views. Created by renowned Costa Rican architect José Mora, it stands out for its manta ray-inspired structure, glass walls framing the Pacific, travertine floors, Venetian stucco, handcrafted wood furnishings, and original art pieces. Interior Entrance with an oversized wooden door. Open-concept living room, bright and elegant, with a sectional sofa for 12 and a custom entertainment center. Modern kitchen with an island, light wood cabinetry, and stainless steel appliances. Dining area with a local wood table and designer lamp. Bedrooms 4 en-suite bedrooms + ½ bathroom. Ground floor guest rooms with queen beds. Two master suites on the second floor with king beds, spacious walk-in closets, private balconies, and bathrooms with rain showers and ocean views. Architectural Details Central staircase framed by large windows. Panoramic second-floor window with an "aquarium" effect. Exterior Spacious terrace with an outdoor kitchen, grill, and dining area. Curved infinity pool and lounge with ocean views. Solar energy installed. Community Miramar, within Mar Vista, combines security, tranquility, and nature. It offers: Gym, sports courts, and trails. Gracia Restaurant with an infinity pool and sea view. Private school at the community entrance. Proximity to Flamingo and Conchal beaches, marina, supermarkets, restaurants, and medical services. 👉 Schedule your visit and experience this unique property in Playa Flamingo firsthand.
